channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: A TikTok influencer was arrested for shoplifting in Florida after posting a video showing her Target haul
item.description: Marlena Velez, 22, who goes by the TikTok handle @marlenavelezz, was arrested for shoplifting after broadcasting her haul of allegedly stolen Target goods in a video to her 350,000 followers. The influencer was charged with one count of petty theft in Florida.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: National Archives Leverages AI for Enhanced Customer Experience
item.description: NARA launches an AI tool utilizing generative AI to improve customer experience for researchers and visitors.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Is Outlook down? Thousands of Microsoft 365 users report outage issues
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Thousands of Microsoft 365 customers worldwide reported having issues with services like Outlook and Teams on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: How Scale became the go-to company for AI training
item.description: For the large language models (LLMs) that power apps like ChatGPT, Anthopic’s Claude, and Google’s Gemini to be good conversational partners and assistants, they need to be trained by humans with plenty of examples of appropriate answers.
item.dc:creator: Steven Melendez, Fast Company

item.title: Meet the USC student rocket club that shattered a world altitude record
item.description: This could not be happening. Five years after becoming the first students to launch a rocket into space, the University of Southern California Rocket Propulsion Lab (USCRPL) was readying a redesigned model, Aftershock II, for an even higher ascent from Nevada’s Black Rock Desert.
item.dc:creator: Susan Karlin, Fast Company

item.title: iPhone Users Rejoice: Understanding iOS 18's Automatic Mic Mode
item.description: iOS 18 has introduced a new feature called Automatic Mic Mode, which adapts to your surroundings to enhance call quality. Learn how to use it and still enjoy Voice Isolation.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 3 reasons why the US government should lean on data and AI efficiency
item.description: Elon Musk revolutionized products in the auto industry. No one brand since the Model T and Henry Ford has had such a profound impact on design thinking, efficiency, and innovation all running in parallel. Tesla cars can be updated 40 times more frequently than the giants in the industry.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Impacto de la IA en las empresas: Necesidad de capacitación y estándares
item.description: La inteligencia artificial (IA) cambia la forma en que operan las empresas, necesitando capacitación para empleados y personal cualificado.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: The Growing Phenomenon of Ghost Jobs: A Threat to Labor Market Transparency
item.description: Ghost jobs are fake job advertisements posted by companies, distorting economic indicators and wasting candidates' time. Research suggests 80% of recruiters admit to posting fake job offers.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: The Onion's bid for Alex Jones' Infowars hangs in the balance as judge orders new hearing
item.description: A federal judge in Texas has delayed a hearing in conspiracy theorist Alex Jones' effort to stop the satirical news outlet The Onion from buying Infowars and turning it into a parody.
item.dc:creator: Dave Collins, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Social media sites call for Australia to delay its ban on children younger than 16
item.description: An advocate for major social media platforms has told Australia's Parliament that a plan to ban children younger than 16 from the sites should be delayed rather than being rushed to approval this week.
item.dc:creator: Rod Mcguirk, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Roblox gives parents more control over kids' experience
item.description: Roblox, which has been downloaded millions of times, announced sweeping and restrictive settings for minor safety.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: Crypto, online betting, and vaping: Welcome to the Trump economy
item.description: From tariffs and Big Tech to impacts on the free market—everyone wants to know what Donald Trump’s return to office means for the business world. To cut through the noise, political scientist Ian Bremmer offers his insights.
item.dc:creator: Robert Safian, Fast Company

item.title: AWS and Anthropic ink deal to accelerate model development, enhance AI chips
item.description: The announcement that Amazon Web Services (AWS) will be Anthropic’s primary training partner confirms rumors of an even tighter partnership between the two companies. They announced Friday that Anthropic will use AWS Trainium processors to train and deploy its Claude family of models.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: UK regulator says Apple, Google blocking innovation in mobile browsers
item.description: The United Kingdom’s top antitrust regulator said Friday that an independent inquiry provisionally found that Apple's and Google’s policies for mobile browsers are blocking innovation.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: SpaceX will deliver its first lunar terrain vehicle to the Moon by 2029
item.description: Hot on the heels of another productive test flight, two new lunar customers have been added to the flight manifest for SpaceX’s Starship. Eagle landing Lunar Outpost said on Thursday that SpaceX will deliver its first Lunar Terrain Vehicle, Eagle, to the Moon by 2029.
item.dc:creator: Tim Fernholz, Fast Company

item.title: Bitcoin ticks closer to $100,000 in extended surge following US elections
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Bitcoin extended its streak of record highs after ticking above $99,000 for the first time. The cryptocurrency has rocketed more than 40% in just two weeks.
item.dc:creator: WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Comcast to spin off cable networks that were once the entertainment giant's star performers
item.description: Streaming service Peacock will remain with Comcast, as will Bravo, which provides significant content for the Peacock streaming service, and other assets like the NBCUniversal's studios and theme parks.
item.dc:creator: MATT OTT and WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Microsoft pitches AI 'agents' that can perform tasks on their own at Ignite 2024
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella told customers at a conference in Chicago on Tuesday that the company is teaching a new set of artificial intelligence tools how to "act on our behalf across our work and life.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: German police break up an environmental activists' camp near Tesla plant outside Berlin
item.description: BERLIN (AP) — German police broke up a protest camp housing environmental activists in a forest near the Tesla electric car factory in Grünheide outside Berlin on Tuesday, citing violations of public safety and order.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News
